title: DPSim M3 Binding And Breakthrough AssayRecord

process_conditions.description: Numeric assay domain metadata. Static records may include equilibrium_concentration_mol_m3 and q_max_reference_mol_m3 for Langmuir K_affinity, or multiple equilibrium concentrations for weighted isotherm fitting. Dynamic records may provide scalar DBC replicates or raw breakthrough arrays such as time_s plus C_over_C0, feed_concentration_mol_m3, flow_rate_m3_s, and bed_volume_m3. Pressure-flow records may provide flow_rates_m3_s plus pressure_drops_Pa for weighted hydraulic slope fitting. Include pH, temperature_C, salt_concentration_M, residence_time_s, bed_height_m, column_diameter_m, and molecular_weight metadata where measured.
